basic_details.job_title: AP University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 1523 Professor, Lecturer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Assistant Librarian, Lecturer
basic_details.short_information: Andhra University is recruiting 1523 Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, Assistant Librarian, and Lecturer posts across 19 State Universities in Andhra Pradesh with post-wise qualifications including Master’s Degree, Ph.D., NET/SET/SLET, and relevant disciplines, last date 08 June 2026.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 15-05-2026 Starting Date for Apply Online: 18-05-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 08-06-2026 Exam Date: 22-06-2026

application_fee.details: General / BC / EWS: Rs. 2500 SC / ST / PwBD: Rs. 2000 OCI Candidates: Rs. 4200 (USD 50)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 44 Years SC / ST / BC / EWS: 5 Years Relaxation PwBD: 10 Years Relaxation

qualification.education_qualification: Post Wise (Master’s Degree, Ph.D., NET/SET/SLET, Library Science, Relevant Discipline)

salary_details.details: Assistant Professor: Level 10 – ₹57,700 to ₹1,82,400 Assistant Professor (Senior Scale): Level 11 – ₹68,900 to ₹2,05,500 Assistant Professor (Selection Grade): Level 12 – ₹79,800 to ₹2,11,500 Associate Professor: Level 13A – ₹1,31,400 to ₹2,17,100 Professor: Level 14 – ₹1,44,200 to ₹2,18,200 Senior Professor: Level 15 – ₹1,82,200 to ₹2,24,100

selection_process: The selection process differs depending on the post. Assistant Professor posts include a written test
while Associate Professor and Professor posts are shortlisted through academic and research score followed by interview.
Interview Associate Professor / Professor: Eligibility Screening
how_to_apply: Click on the relevant university faculty recruitment link
Register with your email ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with personal and academic details
Submit the form and keep a printout for future reference

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in AP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 1,523 vacancies have been announced across 19 Andhra Pradesh State Universities, including 1,244 regular and 279 backlog posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for AP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is June 8, 2026.

faq.question: Q3. When will the AP Assistant Professor 2026 exam be conducted?
faq.answer: The Computer-Based Test (CBT) for Assistant Professor posts is scheduled for June 22, 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree with at least 55% marks along with UGC-NET/CSIR-NET/APSET/APSLET qualification or a Ph.D. as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 44 years, with relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/BC/EWS and 10 years for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for AP Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: General/BC/EWS candidates need to pay ₹2500, SC/ST/PwBD candidates ₹2000, and OCI candidates USD 50 (₹4200 approx.).

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes eligibility screening, CBT written test, shortlisting, academic score evaluation, and interview.

faq.question: Q8. How many Assistant Professor vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are 1,020 Assistant Professor vacancies in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary of an Assistant Professor in Andhra Pradesh Universities?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from ₹57,700 to ₹1,82,400 under Level 10 pay scale, with higher pay for senior and selection grades.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for AP Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official website https://apuniversitiesrecruitment.apcfss.in by registering, filling out the form, uploading documents, paying the fee, and submitting the application.
